name: Grappler
description: Advantage on attack rolls against creatures you are grappling; you can try to pin a grappled creature (both restrained).

name: Alert
description: Add your proficiency bonus to Initiative, and swap Initiative with a willing ally when you roll.

name: Crafter
description: Gain proficiency with three artisan's tools, buy nonmagical gear at a discount, and craft faster during a rest.

name: Healer
description: Use a Healer's Kit as a bonus action to let a creature spend a Hit Die and regain that much plus your proficiency bonus in hit points.

name: Lucky
description: You have Luck points equal to your proficiency bonus; spend one for advantage on a d20 test or to impose disadvantage on an attack against you.

name: Magic Initiate (Cleric)
description: Learn two cleric cantrips and one level-1 cleric spell you can cast once per long rest (or with slots you have).

name: Magic Initiate (Wizard)
description: Learn two wizard cantrips and one level-1 wizard spell you can cast once per long rest (or with slots you have).

name: Musician
description: Gain proficiency with three musical instruments; after a rest, grant Heroic Inspiration to allies up to your proficiency bonus.

name: Savage Attacker
description: Once per turn when you hit with a weapon, roll its damage dice twice and use either total.

name: Skilled
description: Gain proficiency in any three skills or tools of your choice.

name: Tavern Brawler
description: Your unarmed strikes deal 1d4 damage, you can shove or grapple as part of one, and you reroll 1s on unarmed and improvised-weapon damage.

name: Tough
description: Your hit point maximum increases by twice your character level, and by 2 each level gained thereafter.
